videoSnippet.title: This Game Means Everything || Pragg vs Magnus || Norway Chess 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Praggnanandhaa R (2733) - Carlsen, Magnus (2840)
Norway Chess 2026 (Chess.com) [05] 2026.05.27
B90 Sicilian, Najdorf

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 d6 3.d4 cxd4 4.Nxd4 Nf6 5.Nc3 a6 6.h4 h6 7.Bc4 e6 8.a3 Nc6 9.Be3 Bd7 10.Ba2 Be7 11.Qe2 h5 12.f3 Ne5 13.O-O-O Rc8 14.Bg5 Rxc3 15.bxc3 Qa5 16.Kb1 Qxa3 17.f4 Neg4 18.e5 dxe5 19.fxe5 Nh7 20.Qd2 Nf8 21.Nf3 Qc5 22.Bxe7 Qxe7 23.Ng5 Ng6 24.Ne4 N6xe5 25.Nd6+ Kf8 26.Rhf1 Nf6 27.Qd4 Neg4 28.Nxb7 Bb5 29.Qd8+ Ne8 30.Qxe7+ Kxe7 31.c4 Ba4 32.Rd8 Bc6 33.Rb8 Bxg2 34.Rg1 Bf3 35.Rg3 Ne5 36.c5 g5 37.Nd6 g4 38.Nc8+ Kf6 39.Nd6 Nxd6 40.Rxh8 Ne4 41.Rg1 Nc3+ 42.Kb2 Ne2 43.Rf1 g3 44.c6 Kg7 45.c7 Bb7 46.Rb8 g2
